News

Recent updates

Talks, accepted papers, awards, and other milestones.

21 November 2024

Joining Google Research as a student researcher

I'll be joining Google Research as a student researcher, working with Drs. Divy Thakkar and Anoop Sinha

14 October 2024

Program committee for IUI 2025

I'll be serving as a program committee member for IUI 2025

18 January 2024

Three CHI papers accepted

Three CHI papers on LLMs for designing / health have been accepted to CHI 2024

12 December 2023

Joining Adobe Research as a research intern

I'll be joining Adobe Research as a research scientist intern this summer, working with Dr. Gromit Chan

10 December 2023

Program committee for CHI 2024

I'll be serving as a program committee member for CHI 2024

01 March 2023

Joining Naver AI as a research intern

Excited to be working as a research intern at Naver AI Lab this summer, working with Dr. Young-Ho Kim

13 January 2023

Two CHI papers accepted

Excited to share that two papers on AI-mediated communication and online learning have been accepted to CHI 2023!

15 October 2022

CSCW paper accepted

Our paper on investigating explanation strategies in human-AI collaboration has been accepted to CSCW 2023

28 September 2022

Started my graduate study at UW HCDE

So excited to begin my new journey as a Ph.D. student in HCDE at the University of Washington 🎉

29 July 2022

Seleted as the 2022 Korean Government Scholar for Overseas Studies

Honored to be selected as one of the 2022 Korean Government Scholars for Overseas Studies

30 April 2022

First in-person conference attendance @ CHI 2022

Excited to attend my first in-person conference (CHI 2022) in New Orleans, LA. See you there soon!
